prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Toyota 1NZ-FE (1.5L VVT-i)** with a **Garrett GT2560R turbocharger** (58mm compressor, 60mm turbine) running 18psi on a **HKS GT-SS intercooler** (2.5" core, 600x300x65mm) and a **Toda Racing 87mm forged crankshaft** with **CP-Carrillo forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** for 250whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU**

Full **KYB AGX adjustable coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear)** with **Cusco 22mm front sway bar** and **D2 Racing rear camber arms** for aggressive cornering, paired with **Project Mu B-Spec brake pads** and **DBA 5000 Series rotors (280mm front, 240mm rear)** for fade-resistant stopping power

Custom **3.5" stainless steel exhaust system** with a **Sparco 4-2-1 equal-length header** and **HKS Hi-Power Super SQV4 blow-off valve**, mated to a **Tomei 2.5" downpipe** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for optimized turbo spool and backpressure reduction
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (front fenders + rear overfenders) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** and **Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type 3, 30% weight reduction)** for aggressive stance and aerodynamics

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (15x8 +25 front, 15x9 +30 rear)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (195/50R15 front, 215/45R15 rear)** for maximum grip, paired with **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub** and **Sparco Grid-Q seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved)**

**Custom LED taillight conversion** using **Morimoto XB35 bulbs** and **VLEDS sequential turn signals**, with a **full carbon fiber rear diffuser** (custom 3D-printed mold) and **Aerocatch hood pins** for a race-inspired aesthetic
